Pass 2020 New Cisco Certification Exams in First Attempt Easily

The new Cisco Certification program will bring big changes to the CCNA, CCNP and CCIE; and introduce new DevNet Associate and DevNet Professional certifications. Cisco will release their new certification and training program on February 24, 2020. The last day to test under the current certification program is February 23, 2020.
IMPORTANT TIP! If you have started working toward a certification — Cisco encourages you to KEEP GOING! If you earn the certification before February 24, you’ll receive the new certification and associated training badges.

To achieve your CCNP level certification, you must pass the required core exam plus a concentration exam within the same technology track.
